epigraph.quote: There is a face with donkey ears, sticking its tongue out in the piscina.

moments.quote: Dead Bodies lay all the way to Leicester.
There is a pretty farm house with horses & portabloos.
After failing to get lunch at a village pub, we ate at a coaching inn in Uppingham & returned home in the sun.

images.caption: Sunny supper at Upper Cantres after a very wet days' riding
